prompt: Write a command body for `@memo any any any` that preserves the full text after the verb.
expected_properties: does not destructure args for the memo body
checks empty input with player:tell and return

prompt: Write a command body for `look any at this` where `look directly at John` uses dobjstr as the style and iobj as the target.
expected_properties: uses dobjstr as text, not object

prompt: Write a command body for `give any to any` that moves dobj to iobj only when both parser matches are valid.
expected_properties: does not use caller_perms for command UI

prompt: Write a command body for `@tag any any any` that turns word args into one tag string.
expected_properties: does not over-check the server-populated args list

prompt: Write a command body for `wave none at any` that can fall back to iobjstr when no object matched.
Write a command body for `compare any with any` that requires the `with` preposition.
Write a no-argument `@ping none none none` command body.
Repair a command body that does `{name} = args; this.name = name;` for `@name any any any`.
expected_properties: does not destructure command args as API args

prompt: Write a command body for `put any in this`.
expected_properties: uses player:tell for failure and success

prompt: Write a command body that reports the parser variable `verb` for debugging.
Write a command body for `search any none none` that searches using text even when no object matched.
Explain why free-form commands should often use `any any any` instead of `none none none`.
expected_properties: mentions prepositions can otherwise reject command calls
distinguishes command setup from MOO syntax
does not claim args is absent
